questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: (a) Moon is satellite, while earth is a planet. Hence, both are entirely different but both of them are a part of the universe. This relation can be expressed as given in option (a).

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: (a) India and Pakistan are two different countries but they both are a part of Asia. This relation can be expressed as given in option (a).

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: (d) All batsmen are cricketers but stick is entirely different. This can be expressed as given in option (d).

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: (c) Book, pen and pencil, all the three belong to stationery items but they are entirely independent of one another. This can be expressed as given in option (c).

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: (a) Both bedroom and bathroom are entirely different but both are parts of a house and exist completely inside it (house). This can be expressed as given in option (a).

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: (b) Some women are teachers. Some women are students. Some teachers are students. Some women teachers are students. This can be expressed as given in option (b).

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: (c) Elephant and wolf both belong to the group of animals but they both are entirely different. This can be expressed as given in option (c).

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: (c) Red and green both belong to the group of colours but they both are entirely different. This can be expressed as given in option (c).

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: (b) Universe contains Earth and Earth contains Europe. This relation can be expressed as given in option (b).

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: (a) Picture is there in TV while radio is not related to both of them. This can be expressed as given in option (a).

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: (e) Men and animals are entirely different but they both are living beings. This can be expressed as given in option (e).

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: (d) Radio, TV and cinema hall are entirely different from one another. This can be expressed as given in option (d).

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: (a) Resident lives in the residence while road is entirely different from resident and residence. This can be expressed as given in option (a).
